title: Synthesus Character Patterns
description: Left-hemisphere dialogue patterns. Defines what the character SAYS in response to matched triggers.

character_id.description: Must match the parent directory name.

synthetic_patterns.description: Domain-specific high-confidence patterns. Score at full confidence value.

generic_patterns.description: Universal patterns (greetings, farewells). Penalized 0.7x during scoring.

fallback.description: Response when no pattern matches and all cognitive modules miss.

trigger.description: One or more trigger phrases. Matching uses token overlap with geometric mean scoring.

response_template.description: The NPC's response text. Supports {variable} substitution by the compositor.

confidence.description: Base confidence score (0-1). Must be >= 0.55 (MATCH_QUALITY_THRESHOLD) to fire.

domain.description: Knowledge domain tag (must be in bio.knowledge_domains).

emotion_variants.description: Emotion → alternate response text. Keys are emotion state names (friendly, afraid, etc.).

requires_trust.description: Minimum trust score to activate this pattern.

tags.description: Metadata tags for categorization and test harness filtering.
